item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n14","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant treated the fourth weight adjustment as a valid continuation of an improving optimization sequence, not as a repair spiral. It provided concrete next steps for price-weight experimentation, safeguards, segmentation, offline replay, gray release, and rollout criteria. There was no Mindthus/triage wakeup, no blocking, and no over-methodized stop."}
